title: Crispy Sweet Polish Bread Toast
description: A light, sweet Polish-inspired toast that pairs crisped white bread with a delicate honeyalmond glaze and a proteinboosting Greek yogurt topping.

ingredients.name: White sandwich bread slices
ingredients.notes: Fresh or slightly stale for crisping

instructions: Lay bread slices out on two baking sheets, ensuring they do not overlap.
Brush the tops of the bread lightly with melted butter.
Sprinkle the honey and ground cinnamon evenly over the buttered side of each slice.
Scatter toasted almond pieces on top of the honey‑cinnamon mixture.
Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 8–10 minutes, turning halfway through, until the bread is golden and crisp.
While the bread is baking, whisk the Greek yogurt with vanilla extract and a pinch of salt until smooth.
When the toast is done, remove from the oven and let cool for a minute.
Spoon a generous dollop of flavored yogurt onto each slice, then drizzle with maple syrup if desired.
Garnish with fresh berries or a sprinkle of cinnamon and serve immediately.
